prose.en: Analyze anomalous or suspected adversarial behavior in or related to {param:ir-04.13_odp}.

guidance.en: If the organization maintains a deception environment, an analysis of behaviors in that environment, including resources targeted by the adversary and timing of the incident or event, can provide insight into adversarial tactics, techniques, and procedures. External to a deception environment, the analysis of anomalous adversarial behavior (e.g., changes in system performance or usage patterns) or suspected behavior (e.g., changes in searches for the location of specific resources) can give the organization such insight.

prose.en: anomalous or suspected adversarial behavior in or related to {param:ir-04.13_odp} are analyzed.

objects.en: procedures addressing system monitoring tools and techniques
system monitoring tools and techniques documentation
system configuration settings and associated documentation
list of acceptable thresholds for false positives and false negatives
Organizational personnel with information security responsibilities
Organizational processes for detecting anomalous behavior

guidelines.en: environments or resources which may contain or may be related to anomalous or suspected adversarial behavior are defined;
